description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte black exterior and metallic top, resembling a typical energy drink container. The front displays bold, white and orange text reading 'BLAZING ENERGY DRINK' along with smaller details such as 'CARNITINE & CAFFEINE' and a volume indicator of 250 mL. The back side features a nutrition facts label and barcode, both printed in white, which are partially visible from different angles. The can's top is metallic with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism, slightly recessed into the lid. The overall surface is smooth and hard, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears unopened and intact.
description: A tall, matte black energy drink can with bold white and orange branding, metallic pull-tab top, and smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: The can is shown with partial branding visible, including the letters 'SY' and a glimpse of the metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the nutrition facts label and barcode on the back, with the metallic top also visible.
description_view_2: The can's side is mostly unbranded, with faint text and a clear view of the smooth, cylindrical body.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full 'BLAZING ENERGY DRINK' branding in bold white and orange text, with the volume and ingredients visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front features 'BLAZING ENERGY DRINK' in bold white and orange text, with 'CARNITINE & CAFFEINE' and '250 mL' below; back has a white nutrition facts label and barcode.
